controlSet.description: Reject authority issued by an untrusted or unverifiable issuer.
Reject authority that exceeds declared operational scope.
Require revocation state that is fresh enough for consequential action.
Require policy and context to remain admissible at the moment of execution.
Require an explicit contestability or escalation route when authority legitimacy cannot be established automatically.

failureModes: Authority exists but issuer is no longer trusted
Authority exists but presented scope exceeds allowed action class
Revocation state is stale relative to action criticality
Context changed after issuance and legitimacy is no longer satisfied
Authority fails automatic legitimacy checks and no contestability route exists
decisionPolicy: Execution MUST NOT proceed unless legitimacy is verified at execution time.
